title: Responsive Grid Cards

statement.markdown:
## Responsive Grid Cards Layout

Create a fluid responsive card layout adapting to screen sizes.

### Requirements:
1. **Responsive Columns**: Set layout to display exactly 1 card column on mobile viewports (<640px), 2 columns on tablet viewports (640px - 1024px), and 4 columns on desktop viewports (>1024px).
2. **Grid Gap**: Maintain an even gap spacing of 16px between columns and rows.
3. **Card Styling**: Apply flex containers inside each card centering textual layouts.

constraints: Must implement CSS grid with media queries
Do not use hardcoded absolute positioning for grid cells layout

starterCode.html:
Card 1

Card 4

gradingCriteria.description: Verify single columns are displayed below 640px width.
Verify two columns layout wraps between 640px and 1024px width.
Verify four columns are rendered cleanly above 1024px.
